title: Ini Achcham Achcham Illai Song Lyrics Indira
stanzas:
Ini Achcham Achcham Illai Song Lyrics Indira
#ARRahman #SujathaMohan #AnuradhaSriram

Vidiyaatha iravu endru
edhuvum illai
mudiyaatha thuyar endru
edhuvum illai

vadiyaatha vellam endru
edhuvum illai
vaazhatha vazhkai endru
edhuvum illai

ye achcham achcham illai
ini adimai ennam illai
nam kaalam ingae
koodipochu
kanneer micham illaiye.(2)

kaalam maaripochu
nam kanneer maaripochu
naalai nalla naalai
endra nambikkai undaachu

ye achcham achcham illai
ini adimai ennam illai
nam kaalam ingae
koodipochu
kanneer micham illaiye.

andha nila nila nila
ne odivaaa

pattaampoochi sutrum
manithan enna mattam
ada innum konjam
ponaal enna vaanam
thalaiyil thattum (2)

vaadi ilaiya chelliye
vaadi ilaiya chelliye
nam kaalam sollum
nammai vazha solliye

amma azhagu kannammaa
amma azhagu kannammaa
idhu namm boomi endru
azhuthi sollammaa

ye achcham achcham illai
ini adimai ennam illai
nam kaalam ingae
koodipochu
kanneer micham illaiye.(2)

kaalam maaripochu
nam kanneer maaripochu
naalai nalla naalai
endra nambikkai undaachu (2)

hey vaanam pakkam ini
vazhkai romba pakkam
achcham achcham thutcham
endral pakkam pakkam
sorgam.

boomi thularndhu kedakku
ada manusa payan manasu
pootti kidakku

ini achcham achcham illai
ini adimai ennam illai
ini achcham achcham illai
ini adimai ennam illai
nam kaalam ingae
koodipochu
kanneer micham illaiye.

inbak kaatru veesattum
ettu thikkum paravattam
paravattum paravattum

manitha pookkal malarattum
marangal innum viriyattum
viriyattum viriyattum (2)

kuttram kutram eriyattum
sutram sutram vazhattum

vattam vattam viriyattum
vaanam thottu valarattum(2)

kozhi siragil kunjai polave
boomi pandhu urugattum
ratham sindhaa nootraandu
putham puthithaai viriyattum.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Ini Achcham Achcham Illai?

The song conveys a message of overcoming fear and embracing courage.

Who composed the music for Indira?

The music for Indira was composed by A.R. Rahman.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Anuradha Sriram and Sujatha Mohan.

What is the release year of the movie Indira?

The movie Indira was released in 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ini Achcham Achcham Illai from the movie Indira is a motivational anthem that encourages listeners to shed their fears and embrace life with courage. Set against the backdrop of a narrative that emphasizes empowerment, the song's lyrics inspire resilience and hope. A.R. Rahman's composition, combined with the powerful vocals of Anuradha Sriram and Sujatha Mohan, creates an uplifting experience. The song's energetic and motivational tone makes it a timeless classic that continues to inspire audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ini Achcham Achcham Illai from the movie Indira is a powerful anthem of courage and determination. With A.R. Rahman's inspiring composition and the soulful voices of Anuradha Sriram and Sujatha Mohan, this song uplifts the spirit and motivates listeners to overcome fear. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with audiences even today.
stanzaMeanings: There is no endless night, there is no endless sorrow.
There is no unstoppable flood, there is no life that cannot be lived.
Hey, there is no more fear, no more thoughts of slavery. Our time has come together here, there are no more tears.
Time has changed, our tears have changed. There is hope for a good tomorrow.
Hey, there is no more fear, no more thoughts of slavery. Our time has come together here, there are no more tears.
What is the level of humans circling like butterflies? If we go a little further, the sky will touch our heads.
Withering little one, withering little one, our time tells us to live.
Beautiful mother Kannamma, beautiful mother Kannamma, say firmly that this is our earth.
Hey, there is no more fear, no more thoughts of slavery. Our time has come together here, there are no more tears.
Time has changed, our tears have changed. There is hope for a good tomorrow.
Hey, the sky is now close, life is very close. If fear is nothing, then heaven is close.
The earth is spinning, but the human heart is locked away.
There is no more fear, no more thoughts of slavery. Our time has come together here, there are no more tears.
Let the breeze of happiness blow, let it spread in all directions.
Let human flowers bloom, let the trees still blossom.
Let faults burn away, let the circle of life continue.
Let circles expand, let them grow touching the sky.
Like a chick under a hen's wing, let the earth roll like a ball. Let blood flow, let the new century blossom anew.
